content:
守密人你好：
       彌薩格大學校務處將於3月21日17:50進行校內設施修復，更新完成後您將得到通知，重新進入遊戲。對於更新可能給大家帶來的不便，我們會準備一份補給物資以示歉意。祝大家調查順利！ 
  
【補給物資】
在線維護補償：銀芯*50
  
【領取條件】
領取時間截至2025年4月4日23:59。請記得及時前往郵箱領取補給物資哦。  
 
【更新內容】
● 優化了喚醒體介面中「狂氣爆發」描述的交互體驗，現在可以通過拖動來查看完整的上下文。
● 修復了在日語和韓語版本中，選擇鑰令介面異常的問題。

V2.1.1.6 Online Maintenance Notice
 
Dear Keeper,
    The Mythag University Administration Office will conduct facility repairs on March 21 at 17:50(UTC+8). You will be notified once the update is complete and can re-enter the game. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and will provide a supply package as compensation. Happy investigating!
    
【Supply Package】
Maintenance Compensation: Silver*50
    
【Claim Conditions】
Claim period ends on April 4 2025(UTC+8), at 23:59. Please remember to check your mailbox to claim the supply package.
     
【Update Content】
● Improved the interaction experience of the "Exalt" description in the Awaker interface, now you can drag to view the full context.
● Fixed an issue with the Posse selection interface in the Japanese and Korean versions.
